payload.description: Public Meeting #1 presentation slides for the LaGuardia Airport Access Alternatives Analysis (AA), funded by an FTA grant to study transit access alternatives to LaGuardia Airport. Presented by NYCDOT in collaboration with MTA New York City Transit, MTA Bus Company, and the Port Authority of NY & NJ.

payload.description: Study of transit access alternatives to LaGuardia Airport funded by FTA grant received December 2010. Alternatives Analysis began in May 2011. Focus on low-cost improvements within a short timeframe. Led by NYCDOT working with MTA New York City Transit, MTA Bus Company, Port Authority of NY & NJ, and NYSDOT. Uses FTA Alternatives Analysis process to qualify for future FTA funding. Multiple modal alternatives considered: Bus Rapid Transit, Light Rail Transit, Ferry, Automated Guideway Transit, Streetcar, Heavy Rail. Connects LGA to commercial hubs in Astoria, Harlem, The Hub (Bronx), Midtown, East Elmhurst/Jackson Heights, and Flushing.

evidence_refs.source_quote: LaGuardia Airport Access Alternatives Analysis
December 2010: NYCDOT receives Federal Transit Administration (FTA) grant to study transit access alternatives to LaGuardia Airport (LGA)
May 2011: Alternatives Analysis (AA) begins
Low-cost improvements within a short timeframe are focus of AA
AA will qualify the project for future FTA funding for Environmental Review, detailed Planning and Design etc
Connect LGA to one or more nearby commercial hubs
